media.title: Sintel - Fantasy Anime Adventure (Short Film)
media.description: Sintel is an independently produced computer-animated fantasy movie. The storytelling follows a lonely girl named Sintel who rescues and bonds with a baby dragon she names Scales, embarking on an epic journey.

media.title: Tears of Steel - Cyberpunk Sci-Fi Cinema
media.description: A dark, stunning science fiction CGI film displaying high-tech visual effects. The story takes place in a futuristic cyberpunk city of Amsterdam where a group of soldiers and scientists attempt to save the earth from giant robots.

media.title: Big Buck Bunny - Animated Comedy
media.description: A classic animated movie about a giant giant forest rabbit who takes revenge on three mischievous rodents bullies who upset the peaceful life of the forest.

media.title: Elephants Dream - Surreal Steam Machine
media.description: The world's first open-source 3D animated film. Enter a surreal world inside a giant, mystical, noisy mechanical structure where two individuals of contrasting age explore its deep corridors.

media.title: Lofi Chill Beats - Coding & Studying Session
media.description: Mellow organic hip-hop beats to boost productivity, clear your mind, and find your flow state. Perfect background soundscape for building web apps.

media.title: Synthwave Nightfall - Cyberpunk Ambient Soundtrack
media.description: Retrowave, outrun soundtracks, featuring heavy analog synthesizers, dynamic percussion, and nocturnal atmospheres that take you back to the 80s computer dreams.

playlists.name: Featured Hand-Drawn & 3D Animations
playlists.description: My hand-selected masterworks in compute, visual storytelling, and character models.

playlists.name: Chill Coding Beats & Atmospheric Synths
playlists.description: High-fidelity tracks and instrumental backdrops for deep focus and studying sessions.
